matches.x: “But if all have free agency in the Book of Mormon, all do not have civil liberties. The Zoramites, as we have seen, had a thought-police, ‘therefore they found out privily the minds of all the people,’ and forthwith deported ‘those who were in favor of the words . . . spoken by Alma’” (Hugh Nibley, Since

ll And Hikanah went to Ramah to his house. And the child did minister unto the Lord before Eli the priest,
Alma 35:16 "He caused that his sons should be gathered together, that he might give unto them every one his charge, separately."
